segments: Alternative Profit Businesses (Data Analytics, Third-Party Media Revenue)

supply_chain.dependencies: Approximately 31% of Our Brands units sold are produced in Company's 33 food production plants (14 dairies, 9 deli/bakery plants, 5 grocery product plants, 2 beverage plants, 1 meat plant, 2 cheese plants); remaining Our Brands items produced by outside manufacturers to strict specifications
supply_chain.risks: Disruption in global supply chain could negatively affect business; loss or disruption of supply arrangements due to labor disputes, loss or impairment of key manufacturing sites, acts of war or terrorism, disruptive global political events, natural disasters or health crises, regulatory actions, trade sanctions, tariffs or other external factors; quality control issues; supplier financial distress; ethical sourcing issues

regulatory_risks: Changes in regulatory environment and increased enforcement actions by governmental and regulatory agencies
Compliance with laws and regulations involving antitrust and competition, privacy, data protection, environmental, healthcare, anti-bribery, anti-corruption, tax, accounting, and financial reporting
Changes in federal policy and at regulatory agencies
Health and sanitation standards, food labeling and safety regulations
Equal employment opportunity and minimum wage regulations
Licensing requirements for sale of food, drugs, and alcoholic beverages
Potential product reformulation requirements or recalls to meet new standards
Expanded record keeping, documentation, labeling, or scientific substantiation requirements
Climate-related legislation and regulations limiting greenhouse gas emissions and energy inputs
HFC refrigerant phasedown requirements under state and federal regulations

Increasing governmental and societal attention to ESG matters, including expanding voluntary reporting, diligence, and disclosure on climate change, waste production, water usage, human capital, labor, and risk oversight
Anti-ESG sentiment among certain stakeholders, including governmental authorities, regulators, shareholders and customers
Payment Card Industry Data Security Standards (PCI DSS) compliance requirements
Evolving payment card association and network operating rules, including data security rules and certification requirements
HIPAA (Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act) compliance for pharmacy operations
EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) compliance for applicable international operations
Rapidly changing privacy and information security laws and standards

sanction_risks: Due to ongoing geopolitical conflicts, there is an increased possibility of cyberattacks that could either directly or indirectly affect operations
Geopolitical and catastrophic events, such as wars and conflicts, civil unrest, acts of terrorism or other acts of violence could materially affect results
